title: Pipeline Stepper v3 — Vertical Timeline + Title + Integration

tasks.title: Add title field to DirectiveState and populate from directive source

dod.criterion: DirectiveState interface has optional title?: string field in both server/types.ts and src/stores/types.ts
DirectiveWatcher populates title from directive .json title field or .md h1 heading
Falls back to directiveName (slug) when no title source found

tasks.title: Rewrite PipelineStepper as vertical timeline layout

dod.criterion: FullStepper renders vertical timeline: nodes on left, labels + artifacts right
CompactStepper renders vertical at 280px width without overflow
All existing functionality preserved: pulse, flash, elapsed, needsAction, failed, tooltips, artifacts

tasks.title: Show stepper on Projects + Game, display title not slug

dod.criterion: DirectiveProgress.tsx displays title (falling back to directiveName)
ReportsPanel.tsx displays title instead of slug
ActivePipelineStepper renders for both active and completed directives
